content.en:
"General Jiuji, you are very good!"

The Wind King commented.

"Thank you for the praise from the Wind King!" Ye Tian said lightly.

"Okay, I don't have much time, so I won't say more, let's start canonizing the generals now!" The Wind King began to announce in front of countless True Ancestors: "General Jiuji is ranked as an invincible True Ancestor, and from today on, he will be the fourth general of Black Wind Mountain, and the status of the other three major generals is equal to each other!"

"Congratulations to General Jiuji!"

"Congratulations to General Jiuji!"

"Congratulations to General Jiuji!"

One True Ancestor congratulated sincerely.

At this moment, the Wind King waved his hand, and a glittering token appeared in his hand.

This is also a general's order, but it is not an ordinary general's order, but a general's order.

This token alone is worth a lot of money, because it is a Dao weapon, and it is not an ordinary Dao weapon.

"This is the general's order, you can contact the six kings, but if there is no important time, don't contact us!"

The Wind King handed the general order to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian accepted this general order and prepared to slowly refine it after going back.

Originally, if the general order was canonized, a celebration banquet would be held up and down the Black Wind Mountain, and many heavenly kings and ten kings would celebrate together.

But now, the six kings are asleep, and this wisp of consciousness of the Wind King can't stay long, so this feast can only be held privately after the Wind King leaves.

Subsequently.

The Wind King took out another set of generals' battle armor, battle robes, battle boots, battle helmets, masks, and a blade - a war knife, each part is a relatively good Dao weapon, once it is combined, it ranks as a top Dao weapon.

This set of equipment alone is enough to improve the combat effectiveness of not weak, and the value is very high.

Subsequently, the Wind King rewarded a lot of good things, including a copy of the Wind King's own Xeon Wind Path Codex,

The Wind King was a member of the Supreme Dao Ancestor realm that he had stepped into with the Supreme Wind Channel, so the Supreme Wind Path Codex he made was of great value to others, and even Ye Tian was very interested in the Supreme Wind Channel.

After all, he walked the Endless Wind Path, although Dao Ancestor could also take a single avenue, but he couldn't use his potential.

But Ye Tian was not willing to do this, he still wanted to comprehend the Xeon Endless Dao, and the Xeon Endless Dao naturally included the Xeon Wind Dao.

Therefore, this Xeon Wind Passage Codex is also extremely valuable to him.

"Thank you, Wind King!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"Okay, General Nine Extremes, you can cultivate well!"

This wisp of consciousness of the Wind King dissipated in an instant.

Next, Black Wind Mountain held a feast, in which the cost was all borne by Black Wind Mountain, and Ye Tian did not need to spend any resources.

This feast was to celebrate Ye Tian becoming the fourth general of Black Wind Mountain, and this feast lasted for a month.

After becoming the fourth general of Black Wind Mountain, Ye Tian's life has not changed much, and he still cultivates and cultivates.

However, Ye Tian had one more cultivation task, and that was to comprehend the Wind King's Supreme Wind Dao Codex.

this day.

Ye Tian's forbidden body has been refined to thirty percent, which is a great news, although thirty percent of the forbidden body has not reached the realm of small success, it is a small transformation, much stronger than twenty percent of the forbidden body.

Among Ye Tian's many cultivation goals, the next goal was to cultivate the Thousand Dao Technique of the Ten Thousand True Spear to the Dacheng realm and hit the strongest attack record.

Originally, Ye Tian was going to retreat until the Ten Thousand Evil True Spear broke through to the Dacheng realm, but it backfired, and Ouyang Jiu'er came to him for help.

Last time, Ouyang Jiu'er told him about the secret of the Supreme True Ancestor, and he naturally couldn't refuse Ouyang Jiu'er.

----------------

"Jiu'er, what are you looking for me?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Brother Ye, I really need your help this time!" Ouyang Jiu'er said helplessly: "It's not to dig up a certain treasure, it's my own problem." If I can't solve this problem, I won't be able to step into the invincible True Ancestor combat power for the rest of my life!"

"How is that possible?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He knew Ouyang Jiu'er's identity, he was the reincarnation of a half-step domain ancestor, what was an invincible true ancestor to Ouyang Jiu'er?

How could Ouyang Jiu'er not be able to step into the realm of the Invincible True Ancestor!

"Hey, I guess you also have some doubts, why do I know a lot of things, I'm afraid I have doubts about my identity, okay, I won't hide it from you, in fact, I am the reincarnation of a Dao Ancestor, but I am just an ordinary Dao Ancestor!" Ouyang Jiu'er explained.

"I see!"

Ye Tian deliberately pretended to be suddenly enlightened, but in his heart he despised Ouyang Jiu'er very much, obviously he was the reincarnation of a half-step domain ancestor, and he had to say that he was the reincarnation of an ordinary Dao ancestor.

Of course, he was also able to understand Ouyang Jiu'er.

After all, it would be amazing to say that he was the reincarnation of a half-step domain ancestor.

I saw Ouyang Jiu'er say: "In the last life, at the True Ancestor level, the limit I finally reached was the Supreme True Ancestor, and then I entered the Dao Ancestor realm. Now that he has been reincarnated, he has been limited by his origin, so he can't break through the shackles!"

"Why is this happening?"

Ye Tian asked.

"This is the result of the imprint of the Origin. You should know that the True Ancestor is the fusion of the Great Dao and the Soul, and at this time, the Origin Imprint will be formed. Once this life only becomes the Supreme True Ancestor, that Origin Imprint is the Origin Imprint of the Supreme True Ancestor level. In the future, even if you step into the Dao Ancestor and become stronger, once you are reincarnated, this origin brand will still exist, restricting the reincarnation's combat power. Therefore, the True Ancestor is a very critical realm, if you can't rush into the invincible True Ancestor combat power, it will be useless to reincarnate in the future!, but I am not willing to only become the strongest True Ancestor, I also want to enter the invincible True Ancestor combat power!" Ouyang Jiu'er gritted his teeth and said.

"So how can I help you?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Take me to a place and take out a treasure, that treasure can break the origin brand, and there are only a few in the entire vast sea realm. Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"Where?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Heavenly Emperor Palace!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"What, Heavenly Emperor Palace?" Ye Tian's pupils shrank sharply, and he suddenly felt incredible.

As one of the generals of Black Wind Mountain, he now knows a lot of secrets, and he has also heard the other three generals talk about the situation of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Black Wind Mountain guessed that the Heavenly Emperor Palace was hidden in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, but no one could find it.

Moreover, the Heavenly Emperor Palace is a legendary-level force, and even the Nine Heavens are far inferior to the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Go to the Heavenly Emperor's Palace to steal treasures, is he tired of living?

"Jiu'er, this is too difficult!" Ye Tian wanted to refuse on the spot.

Ouyang Jiu'er hurriedly said: "Brother Ye, I must have thought that you could do it, so I asked you to help! Moreover, we are not going to the base camp of the Heavenly Emperor Palace. Actually, I can't find where the current base camp of the Heavenly Emperor Palace is. I'm talking about a palace in the Heavenly Emperor's Palace, and I happen to know where it is. For some time, I've been investigating, and I finally have an eyebrow. In addition, if you help me, I may be able to reap great benefits. Any palace in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, there are also a lot of treasures inside!"

"But if you offend the Heavenly Emperor Palace, wouldn't you be looking for death!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Don't worry, the current situation in the Heavenly Emperor Palace is very complicated, I don't know how long it will take to be born, and you are the general of the Black Wind Mountain, the Heavenly Emperor Palace will not dare to kill you casually!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"Will the Heavenly Emperor Palace be afraid of Black Wind Mountain?" Ye Tian was surprised.

"It's not that I'm afraid, it's jealous!" Ouyang Jiu'er said: "You probably don't know much about the strength of Black Wind Mountain, don't you say it's you, even your Heavenly Kings of Black Wind Mountain don't know much about Black Wind Mountain's strength." If you really thought that Black Wind Mountain had that little strength, it would have been destroyed by the other Upper Triple Heaven forces or Nine Heaven forces a long time ago!"

Ye Tian was a little confused, could it be that Black Wind Mountain still has hidden strength?

"In this way, let me tell you about the secrets of Black Wind Mountain, how about you help me?"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed on the spot!
